name: HRC_ARM_COMPOSITES_VL
query: SELECT HAC.COMPOSITE_ID COMPOSITE_ID, HAC.COMPOSITE_NAME COMPOSITE_NAME, HAC.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, HAC.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, HAC.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HAC.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HAC.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HAC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HAC.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HAC.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HACTL.NAME NAME, HACTL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION FROM HRC_ARM_COMPOSITES_B HAC, HRC_ARM_COMPOSITES_TL HACTL WHERE HAC.COMPOSITE_ID = HACTL.COMPOSITE_ID AND HACTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
